calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Irrevocable Disclaimer Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Trutner appeared by telephone for Michael May (Petitioner).

Ms. Trutner stated that the purpose of the disclaimer trust was simply to make use of the Wife's federal tax exclusion. The Court noted that the trust can also terminate under Probate Code 15403. The Petition to Terminate Irrevocable Disclaimer Trust Due to Changed Circumstances is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Terminate Irrevocable Disclaimer Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
